source: Flightradar24 API reference tracks, transformed to DXB Unreal runway coordinates
note: Real reference track shapes are used as the map. Tracks are rotated per flight so the takeoff/landing tangent aligns to the supplied Unreal runway direction. Clean runway ground paths are added with small offsets. Smoothed version: airborne XY/Z points were low-pass smoothed to reduce zig-zag noise while preserving runway anchors, timings, IDs, and point counts. Runway direction fix: tracks were flipped 180 degrees around their assigned runway midpoint so the runway start/end direction is reversed while preserving timing, IDs, point counts, and smoothed track shapes. Arrival landing points were moved from the runway end to the first quarter / middle of each runway while preserving smoothed reference track shapes and timestamps. Departures mirrored across their assigned runway centerline; arrivals left unchanged. Runways swapped after final validation: every flight previously on runway_1 was moved to runway_2 and every flight previously on runway_2 was moved to runway_1, preserving the existing track shape, timing, smoothing, runway flips, arrival touchdown adjustment, and departure mirroring. Final amendment: arrivals only were shifted along their assigned runway axis so touchdown is closer to the runway start point; departures, timings, IDs, point counts, smoothing, mirrored departure setup, and runway swap remain unchanged. Points doubled by adding interpolated midpoints between every existing track point; original line shapes, timing window, IDs, runway assignments, and arrival/departure behavior are preserved. Speed fix: timestamps were retimed along the same XY/Z paths so takeoff, approach, touchdown, and rollout speeds stay in a reasonable airliner range; geometry, IDs, runway assignment, direction, and point counts are unchanged.

schedule.speed_fix: timestamps retimed per segment; flight start times preserved; end times updated per realistic speed profile

departure_mirror_adjustment.method: For each departure, XY points were reflected across the assigned runway line from runway start to endpoint. Timestamps, Z values, IDs, runway assignment, arrivals, and point counts were preserved.

transform_history.description: Moved each flight from its assigned runway to the other runway using runway-relative coordinates; visual shape/timing preserved.
Translated arrival tracks along their assigned runway centerline so touchdown fractions are around 0.14-0.23 from runway start. Departures unchanged.
